name: Pikachu
description: It keeps its tail raised to monitor its surroundings.

name: Snorlax
description: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day.

name: Mew
description: Its DNA is said to contain the genetic codes of all Pokémon.

name: Bulbasaur
description: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this Pokémon is born.

name: Ivysaur
description: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

name: Venusaur
description: Its plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: Charmander
description: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: Charmeleon
description: It has a barbaric nature. In battle, it whips its fiery tail around and slashes with sharp claws.

name: Charizard
description: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

name: Squirtle
description: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.

name: Wartortle
description: It is recognized as a symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that Wartortle is very old.

name: Blastoise
description: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.

name: Caterpie
description: For protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antennae on its head to drive away enemies.

name: Metapod
description: It is preparing for evolution. Its shell is as hard as an iron slab, but its body inside is soft.

name: Butterfree
description: It loves the nectar of flowers and can locate even tiny amounts of pollen.

name: Weedle
description: Beware of the sharp stinger on its head. It hides in grass and bushes where it eats leaves.

name: Kakuna
description: Able to move only very slightly. When endangered, it may stick out its stinger and poison its enemy.

name: Beedrill
description: It has three poisonous stingers and can fly at high speeds.

name: Pidgey
description: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

name: Pidgeotto
description: The claws on its feet are well developed. It can carry prey such as Exeggcute over 60 miles.

name: Pidgeot
description: It spreads its beautiful wings wide to frighten enemies. It can fly at Mach 2 speed.

name: Rattata
description: Its fangs are long and very sharp. They grow continuously, so it gnaws on hard things to whittle them down.

name: Raticate
description: Its hind feet are webbed. They act as flippers, so it can swim in rivers and hunt for prey.

name: Spearow
description: It flaps its small wings busily to fly. Using its beak, it searches in grass for prey.

name: Fearow
description: A Pokémon that dates back many years. If it senses danger, it flies high and away, instantly.

name: Ekans
description: The older it gets, the longer it grows. At night, it wraps its long body around tree branches to rest.

name: Arbok
description: The pattern on its belly is for intimidation. It constricts its foes with its long body.

name: Pikachu
description: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.

name: Raichu
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

name: Sandshrew
description: It loves to bathe in the grit of dry, sandy areas to maintain its hide.

name: Sandslash
description: The spikes on its body are made of its hardened hide. It curls up into a ball to attack.

name: Nidoran♀
description: Although small, its venomous barbs render this Pokémon dangerous.

name: Nidorina
description: When it is with its friends or family, its barbs are tucked away so as not to hurt them.

name: Nidoqueen
description: Its hard, needle-like scales provide strong protection. It uses its bulk to execute powerful moves.

name: Nidoran♂
description: It stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom.

name: Nidorino
description: An aggressive Pokémon that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.

name: Nidoking
description: It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones.

name: Clefairy
description: Its adorable behavior and appearance make it popular with everyone. It is thought to live in quiet mountains.

name: Clefable
description: A timid Pokémon that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Vulpix
description: At the time of its birth, it has only one white tail. The tail separates into six if this Pokémon receives plenty of love.

name: Ninetales
description: It is said to live 1,000 years, and each of its tails is loaded with supernatural powers.

name: Jigglypuff
description: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: Wigglytuff
description: Its body is full of elasticity. By inhaling deeply, it can continue to puff itself up indefinitely.

name: Zubat
description: It has no eyes. Instead, it relies on its ultrasonic cries to echo back and identify its surroundings.

name: Golbat
description: It can drink more than 10 ounces of blood in one go. It is active in the dead of night.

name: Oddish
description: It may be mistaken for a clump of weeds. If you try to pull it out of the ground, it shrieks horribly.

name: Gloom
description: What appears to be drool is actually sweet honey. It is very sticky and clings to anything it touches.

name: Vileplume
description: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

name: Paras
description: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by drawing nutrients from the bug host.

name: Parasect
description: A host-parasite pair in which the mushroom has taken over the host bug. It prefers damp places.

name: Venonat
description: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats insects. It is attracted by light at night.

name: Venomoth
description: The dust-like scales covering its wings are color-coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has.

name: Diglett
description: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.

name: Dugtrio
description: A team of Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

name: Meowth
description: All it does is sleep during the daytime. At night, it patrols its territory with its eyes aglow.

name: Persian
description: A very haughty Pokémon. It will quickly grow attached to anyone who feeds it and keeps it clean.

name: Psyduck
description: It is constantly beset by headaches. If it psychically flexes its wings, it can use mysterious powers.

name: Golduck
description: A professional swimmer. It can swim faster than any human, even in rough seas.

name: Mankey
description: It lives in groups in the treetops. If it loses sight of its group, it becomes infuriated by its loneliness.

name: Primeape
description: It is always furiously enraged. When it becomes angry, its blood circulation is boosted.

name: Growlithe
description: It has a brave and trustworthy nature. It fearlessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.

name: Arcanine
description: A legendary Pokémon in China. Many people are charmed by its grace and beauty while running.

name: Poliwag
description: Its skin is so thin that its internal organs are visible. It has trouble walking on its newly grown feet.

name: Poliwhirl
description: It can live in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.

name: Poliwrath
description: An adept swimmer, it is capable of doing the front crawl or breaststroke faster than any human.

name: Abra
description: It sleeps 18 hours a day. Even while asleep, it can use various extrasensory powers.

name: Kadabra
description: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches even to those nearby.

name: Alakazam
description: Its brain cells multiply continually until it dies. As a result, it remembers everything.

name: Machop
description: Though small, it has enough desire to master all types of martial arts to become very strong.

name: Machoke
description: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

name: Machamp
description: It uses its four powerful arms to pin the limbs of its foe, then throws them over the horizon.

name: Bellsprout
description: A carnivorous Pokémon that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up moisture.

name: Weepinbell
description: It spits out PoisonPowder to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of Acid.

name: Victreebel
description: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

name: Tentacool
description: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stingers.

name: Tentacruel
description: The 80 tentacles can be extended and retracted freely. They entrap prey and weaken it with toxin.

name: Geodude
description: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step on them.

name: Graveler
description: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.

name: Golem
description: Its body is like a stone. It is known to explode on occasion, so handle with care.

name: Ponyta
description: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat.

name: Rapidash
description: It has an incredibly competitive nature. It will gallop at anything that moves fast.

name: Slowpoke
description: Incredibly slow and sluggish. It is quite content to loll about near water.

name: Slowbro
description: The Shellder that is latched onto its tail is said to feed on the Slowbro's leftovers.

name: Magnemite
description: The units at the sides of its body generate anti-gravity energy to keep it airborne.

name: Magneton
description: A link of three Magnemite. It generates powerful radio waves that raise temperatures.

name: Farfetch'd
description: It can't live without the stalk it holds. That's why it defends the stalk from attackers.

name: Doduo
description: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. It leaves giant footprints.

name: Dodrio
description: A peculiar Pokémon species with three heads. It can run across arid plains even in summer.

name: Seel
description: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.

name: Dewgong
description: Its entire body is a snowy-white. It's impervious to even the most extreme cold.

name: Grimer
description: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

name: Muk
description: Smells so awful, it can cause fainting. Through degeneration, it lost its sense of smell.

name: Shellder
description: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.

name: Cloyster
description: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick succession. Its innards have never been seen.

name: Gastly
description: Almost invisible, this gaseous Pokémon cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

name: Haunter
description: By licking, it saps the victim's life. It causes shaking that won't stop until the victim's demise.

name: Gengar
description: Under a full moon, this Pokémon likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.

name: Onix
description: As it digs through the ground, it absorbs many hard objects. This is what makes its body so solid.

name: Drowzee
description: If you sleep by it all the time, it will show you dreams it has eaten in the past.

name: Hypno
description: When it is very hungry, it puts humans it meets to sleep, then it feasts on their dreams.

name: Krabby
description: Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they can be used for balance while walking sideways.

name: Kingler
description: The large pincer has 10,000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy.

name: Voltorb
description: It was discovered when Poké Balls were introduced. It is said that there is some connection.

name: Electrode
description: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

name: Exeggcute
description: Often mistaken for eggs. When cracked, it's found to have a consistency like seeds.

name: Exeggutor
description: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an Exeggcute.

name: Cubone
description: Wears the skull of its deceased mother. Its cries echo inside the skull and come out as a sad melody.

name: Marowak
description: The bone it holds is its primary weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang.

name: Hitmonlee
description: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs with extra-long, jumping strides.

name: Hitmonchan
description: While apparently doing nothing, it fires punches in lightning-fast succession.

name: Lickitung
description: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks.

name: Koffing
description: In hot places, its internal gases could expand and cause a sudden explosion.

name: Weezing
description: It lives and thrives on poisonous gases from garbage. It has been known to appear in houses.

name: Rhyhorn
description: Its massive bones are 1000 times harder than human bones. It can easily knock a trailer flying.

name: Rhydon
description: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees.

name: Chansey
description: A gentle and kindhearted Pokémon that shares its nutritious eggs if it sees an injured Pokémon.

name: Tangela
description: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to seaweed. Its vines shake as it walks.

name: Kangaskhan
description: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old.

name: Horsea
description: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.

name: Seadra
description: Capable of swimming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail.

name: Goldeen
description: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen.

name: Seaking
description: In the autumn spawning season, they can be seen swimming powerfully up rivers and creeks.

name: Staryu
description: An enigmatic Pokémon that can effortlessly regenerate any appendage it loses in battle.

name: Starmie
description: Its geometric body is extremely colorful. Many people use the gem in its center as jewelry.

name: Mr. Mime
description: If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.

name: Scyther
description: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.

name: Jynx
description: It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

name: Electabuzz
description: Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.

name: Magmar
description: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.

name: Pinsir
description: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard.

name: Tauros
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

name: Magikarp
description: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

name: Gyarados
description: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

name: Lapras
description: A gentle soul that can read the minds of people. It can ferry people across the ocean on its back.

name: Ditto
description: Capable of copying an enemy's genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.

name: Eevee
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element Stones.

name: Vaporeon
description: Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.

name: Jolteon
description: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10,000-volt lightning bolts.

name: Flareon
description: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1,600 degrees.

name: Porygon
description: A Pokémon that consists entirely of programming code. It is capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

name: Omanyte
description: An ancient Pokémon that was recovered from a fossil. It uses air stored in its shell to sink and rise.

name: Omastar
description: A prehistoric Pokémon that died out when its heavy shell made it too slow to catch prey.

name: Kabuto
description: A Pokémon that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.

name: Kabutops
description: Its sleek shape is perfect for swimming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.

name: Aerodactyl
description: A Pokémon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.

name: Snorlax
description: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund belly hums, it becomes increasingly drowsy.

name: Articuno
description: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

name: Zapdos
description: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.

name: Moltres
description: One of the legendary bird Pokémon. It is said that its appearance indicates the coming of spring.

name: Dratini
description: Long considered a mythical Pokémon until recently, when a small colony was found living underwater.

name: Dragonair
description: A mystical Pokémon that exudes a gentle aura. It has the ability to change climate conditions.

name: Dragonite
description: An extremely rarely seen marine Pokémon. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.

name: Mewtwo
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.
